10#ifndef LLVM_LIB_TARGET_POWERPC_PPCTARGETSTREAMER_H
11#define LLVM_LIB_TARGET_POWERPC_PPCTARGETSTREAMER_H
12
13#include "llvm/MC/MCStreamer.h"
14
15namespace llvm {
16class PPCTargetStreamer : public MCTargetStreamer {
17public:
18 PPCTargetStreamer(MCStreamer &S);
19 virtual ~PPCTargetStreamer();
20 virtual void emitTCEntry(const MCSymbol &S) = 0;
21 virtual void emitMachine(StringRef CPU) = 0;
22 virtual void emitAbiVersion(int AbiVersion) = 0;
23 virtual void emitLocalEntry(MCSymbol *S, const MCExpr *LocalOffset) = 0;
24};
25}
26
27#endif
